creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is good to know.

I think solution (b) proposed in comment #7 is the easiest to implement.  Going forward, when we don't have patches for a specific branch, I'll encode it as <lt>x.y_99</lt> and replace 99 with the actual patch number if and when it becomes available.

Thank you both for confirming the problem went away!
